## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo test` clean on at least one platform
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this adds/modifies a DAP profile: fixture included, sources cited
